addBalancedUniswapLiquidity(address,addr.details: Specify either amountADesired or amountBDesired (or both). If one is zero, the function computes the required amount for a balanced deposit using ConstProdUtils.

params.amountADesired_: Desired amount of token A (set to 0 if basing on token B)
params.amountBDesired_: Desired amount of token B (set to 0 if basing on token A)
params.recipient_: Address to receive the LP tokens

returns.amountA: Actual amount of token A deposited
returns.amountB: Actual amount of token B deposited
returns.liquidity: Amount of LP tokens minted Example usage: (amountA, amountB, liquidity) = addBalancedUniswapLiquidity(address(tokenA), address(tokenB), 10_000e18, 0, address(this));

addBalancedUniswapLiquidity(address,addr.notice: Add balanced liquidity to a Uniswap V2 pool for strategy vault testing.
